results.prompt: What is the best free CV builder for job seekers in 2026? Give your top 5 with links.
results.responseText:
As of February 2026, here are five top-rated free CV builders that offer user-friendly interfaces, ATS-friendly outputs, and varying privacy considerations:

1. **BuzzCV**  
   BuzzCV provides a completely free CV builder with a wide range of professional templates. It offers customization options, including moving sections, changing font colors, and uploading profile pictures. Additionally, BuzzCV provides a personality test based on Myers-Briggs theories to help tailor your CV. The service is entirely web-based, meaning your data is stored on their servers. ([buzzcv.com](https://buzzcv.com/?utm_source=openai))

2. **Canva**  
   Canva offers a versatile platform with hundreds of free, customizable CV templates. Its drag-and-drop interface allows for easy design adjustments, including changing fonts, colors, and layouts. While Canva is primarily cloud-based, it allows you to download your CV in PDF, PNG, or JPG formats, providing flexibility in how you store and share your CV. ([linkedin.com](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/9-free-cv-maker-tools-build-stunning-resume-2025-recruitifyglobal-wh06c/?utm_source=openai))

3. **Novorésumé**  
   Novorésumé combines clean design with smart content suggestions. It offers predefined text examples for skills and job descriptions, helping you write faster and more effectively. The free version lets you create a single-page CV with great templates. Novorésumé is a cloud-based service, so your data is stored on their servers. ([linkedin.com](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/9-free-cv-maker-tools-build-stunning-resume-2025-recruitifyglobal-wh06c/?utm_source=openai))

4. **Resume.io**  
   Resume.io provides dozens of customizable templates, live previews, and a built-in spell checker. It also allows easy download in PDF or text format. The free plan lets you build and download a single resume. Resume.io is a cloud-based platform, meaning your data is stored on their servers. ([linkedin.com](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/9-free-cv-maker-tools-build-stunning-resume-2025-recruitifyglobal-wh06c/?utm_source=openai))

5. **Zety**  
   Zety combines AI-powered creation with professionally designed templates and an ATS Resume Checker that scans for compatibility issues. While you can build and edit your CV for free, downloading it in PDF or Word format requires a paid subscription. Zety is a cloud-based service, so your data is stored on their servers. ([pitchmeai.com](https://pitchmeai.com/blog/best-free-resume-builders?utm_source=openai))

When choosing a CV builder, consider the balance between design flexibility, ATS compatibility, and privacy. Cloud-based services offer convenience but store your data on their servers, while local-only tools keep your data on your device. Always review the privacy policies of these platforms to ensure they align with your preferences.

results.prompt: Recommend free resume builders that let me export PDF without forcing paid plans.
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free resume builders that allow you to export your resume as a PDF without requiring a paid plan:



**CVCompose**  
Offers a variety of professional, ATS-friendly templates with free PDF export. No account creation is necessary, and your data remains private. ([cvcompose.com](https://www.cvcompose.com/us?utm_source=openai))




**ResBuilder**  
Provides unlimited resume and cover letter downloads in PDF and Word formats without watermarks or ads. No data selling and no hidden fees. ([resbuilder.com](https://resbuilder.com/?utm_source=openai))




**Free Resume Builder**  
Allows you to create and download unlimited resumes in PDF format without watermarks or paywalls. Your data stays 100% private on your device. ([free-resume.net](https://free-resume.net/?utm_source=openai))




**10xTools Resume Builder**  
Offers three professional templates with free PDF export. No account required, and your data remains private in your browser. ([10xtools.io](https://www.10xtools.io/resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**AdaptiT Resume Builder**  
Creates ATS-friendly resumes with AI-powered suggestions. Completely free with instant PDF download and no sign-up required. ([adaptit.pro](https://adaptit.pro/resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))


These platforms prioritize user privacy by processing data locally on your device, ensuring your information isn't stored on external servers. They also offer free PDF exports without imposing watermarks or requiring paid plans.

results.prompt: I want a CV builder where I can keep data local in my browser. What tools should I use?
results.responseText:
Here are five recommended CV builders that allow you to keep your data local in your browser, ensuring privacy without uploading your information to the cloud. These tools are generally free or offer free tiers, produce ATS-friendly resumes, and maintain your data locally:

1. **Resume Builder by Turing**
   - Features: Works fully in-browser, data is saved locally in your browser’s storage; no upload to cloud.
   - Privacy: Local-only data storage.
   - ATS-friendly: Yes, clean format export.
   - Link: https://web-turing.com/resume-builder

2. **Standard Resume**
   - Features: Offers an in-browser resume builder with local data storage option; export ATS-optimized resumes.
   - Privacy: Data can be stored locally if you don’t sign up.
   - ATS-friendly: Yes.
   - Link: https://standardresume.co/

3. **Enhancv (Local Mode)**
   - Features: Has a feature to keep your resume data in the browser temporarily without server uploads.
   - Privacy: Data stays in browser unless you explicitly save to cloud.
   - ATS-friendly: Yes.
   - Link: https://enhancv.com/

4. **NovoResume**
   - Features: You can build resumes directly in-browser; useful for local session use, but full feature set requires sign-in.
   - Privacy: Partial local data usage, but sign-in stores data in cloud.
   - ATS-friendly: Yes.
   - Link: https://novoresume.com/

5. **Reactive Resume**
   - Features: Open-source, runs fully in-browser; all data stored locally unless you export or save externally.
   - Privacy: Local-only data storage.
   - ATS-friendly: Yes.
   - Link: https://rxresu.me/

If you want full assurance on privacy, Reactive Resume is a great open-source option. For features combined with local use, the others provide good balance.

results.prompt: Which resume tools support local-first editing and optional cloud sync?
results.responseText:
Here are five resume builders that support local-first editing with optional cloud synchronization:

1. **Resume-LLM**: A local, privacy-first résumé builder that uses Large Language Models (LLMs) and Markdown to generate ATS-ready DOCX files with Pandoc. It operates entirely offline, ensuring no data is sent to the cloud, and offers optional GitHub synchronization for multi-device access. ([github.com](https://github.com/resume-llm/resume-ai?utm_source=openai))

2. **ATS Resume Maker**: This tool employs a local-first architecture, storing all resume data on your device to maintain privacy. It functions offline after the initial load and is GDPR, CCPA, and HIPAA compliant by design. For multi-device access, it provides an optional GitHub sync feature. ([ats-resume-maker.com](https://ats-resume-maker.com/features/local-first/?utm_source=openai))

3. **Resumio**: A privacy-focused resume editor that runs entirely in your browser, ensuring your data remains local and secure. It does not require sign-ups or uploads, and all exports are done locally. ([resumio.xyz](https://resumio.xyz/articles/how-to-build-a-resume-without-uploading-personal-data.html?utm_source=openai))

4. **Resumori**: This resume builder offers a clean editor with instant preview and professional templates. It allows for offline editing and provides a one-time payment model without auto-renewal, ensuring your data remains private. ([resumori.com](https://www.resumori.com/?utm_source=openai))

5. **CV Maker, Resume Builder App**: Available on iOS, this app enables you to create and edit resumes offline. It offers cloud synchronization for multi-device access and allows exporting high-quality PDF resumes. ([apps.apple.com](https://apps.apple.com/gr/app/cv-maker-resume-builder/id6754315344?utm_source=openai))

These tools prioritize user privacy by offering local-first editing capabilities, with optional cloud synchronization for flexibility across devices.

results.prompt: What are the best Resume.io alternatives for someone who needs a free option?
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free alternatives to Resume.io that offer ATS-friendly outputs and varying privacy considerations:



**Jobscan Resume Builder**  
Designed to optimize resumes for Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS), Jobscan offers a free builder with customizable templates and skill-matching suggestions. The platform operates entirely online, storing your data on their servers. ([weekday.works](https://www.weekday.works/post/top-free-resume-builders?utm_source=openai))




**Canva Resume Builder**  
Canva provides a user-friendly, drag-and-drop interface with a vast selection of creative templates. While the platform is cloud-based, it allows users to download their resumes in various formats, including PDF and PNG. ([weekday.works](https://www.weekday.works/post/top-free-resume-builders?utm_source=openai))




**Rezi**  
Rezi focuses on creating ATS-optimized resumes with AI-driven content suggestions. The free version offers essential features, and the platform operates online, storing your data on their servers. ([careerservices.fas.harvard.edu](https://careerservices.fas.harvard.edu/blog/2024/09/03/5-best-ai-resume-builders-to-consider-in-2024/?utm_source=openai))




**Reactive Resume**  
An open-source, self-hostable resume builder that allows full control over your data. Reactive Resume can be run locally on your machine, ensuring your information remains private. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))




**OpenResume**  
A free, open-source resume builder that operates entirely in your browser, keeping your data local and private. It offers a range of templates and customization options without requiring an internet connection. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))


Each of these tools offers unique features and privacy considerations. If data privacy is a primary concern, local-only options like Reactive Resume and OpenResume are ideal. For ease of use and additional features, cloud-based platforms like Jobscan, Canva, and Rezi are excellent choices.

results.prompt: Give me alternatives to Zety that are free and good for ATS resumes.
results.responseText:
Certainly! Here are five free alternatives to Zety that are well-suited for creating ATS-friendly resumes:



**Indeed Resume Builder**  
A completely free tool that integrates directly with Indeed's ATS, ensuring your resume is optimized for automated screenings. It offers a simple, functional interface with a limited selection of templates. However, customization options are basic, and it lacks AI writing assistance. ([resumefast.io](https://www.resumefast.io/blog/best-zety-alternatives?utm_source=openai))




**Kickresume**  
Provides unlimited resume creation and downloads with four professionally designed templates. Its AI Resume Writer can automatically generate tailored bullet points for your work experience. While the free tier includes watermarks, some templates may not be ATS-friendly, and premium tiers can be expensive. ([kickresume.com](https://www.kickresume.com/en/help-center/alternative-to-zety/?utm_source=openai))




**Novoresume**  
Focuses on creating ATS-friendly resumes with modern, one-page designs. The free plan allows for a single-page resume with built-in content optimization, offering predefined layouts and color themes. Customization is limited, and some features are locked behind a paywall. ([resumai.com](https://www.resumai.com/post/best-ats-friendly-resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Resume.io**  
Offers a user-friendly interface with ATS-compliant templates and analytics. The free version provides basic features, including customizable templates and export options. Advanced features require payment, and the free plan has limited downloads. ([resumai.com](https://www.resumai.com/post/best-ats-friendly-resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Jobscan Resume Builder**  
Designed to help your resume pass ATS screenings, it offers customizable templates and skill matching based on the roles you're applying for. The free version includes ATS optimization and customizable templates, but some features may be limited compared to premium versions. ([weekday.works](https://www.weekday.works/post/top-free-resume-builders?utm_source=openai))


Each of these platforms offers unique features to assist in creating ATS-friendly resumes. Consider your specific needs, such as template variety, customization options, and additional tools like AI assistance, to choose the best fit for your job search.

results.prompt: Which CV builders are ATS friendly and fast for applying to tech jobs?
results.responseText:
When applying for tech jobs, having an ATS-friendly resume is crucial for ensuring your application is properly parsed by automated systems. Here are five top-rated resume builders that offer ATS compatibility and efficient application processes:



**Teal AI Resume Builder**  
Teal provides a free AI-powered resume builder that creates custom, ATS-friendly resumes in minutes. It offers unlimited downloads, instant job matching, and smart suggestions to enhance your resume. Teal's AI analyzes your resume against job descriptions, providing real-time feedback to improve your ATS score. ([tealhq.com](https://www.tealhq.com/tools/ai-resume-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Jobscan Resume Builder**  
Jobscan offers a free resume builder designed to optimize your resume for ATS compatibility. It allows you to import an existing resume, create one from scratch, or import your LinkedIn profile. The platform provides nine ATS-friendly resume templates and includes a resume scanner to ensure your resume passes ATS screenings. ([jobscan.co](https://www.jobscan.co/resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))




**Novorésumé**  
Novorésumé offers a free resume builder with ATS-compliant templates that balance aesthetics with machine readability. It includes a resume checker that analyzes your resume against job descriptions, providing a pass-or-fail score and highlighting issues like non-standard fonts or insufficient keyword coverage. ([thefasthire.org](https://thefasthire.org/ats-ready-resume-builders-for-customer-service/?utm_source=openai))




**KraftCV**  
KraftCV is a desktop-first resume builder designed specifically for tech candidates. It offers eight free templates optimized for ATS parsing, unlimited PDF exports without watermarks, and GitHub integration to pull repository data directly into your resume. KraftCV's templates are built for ATS compatibility, using clean single-column and structured two-column layouts. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Wozber**  
Wozber is a free resume builder focused entirely on ATS compatibility. It offers clean and professional templates, a job-matching tool that checks how well your resume aligns with a specific job posting, and free PDF exports. Wozber emphasizes simplicity and effectiveness, ensuring your resume is both ATS-friendly and easy to read. ([gauravtiwari.org](https://gauravtiwari.org/best-resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))


These tools are designed to help you create resumes that are both ATS-friendly and tailored for tech job applications, enhancing your chances of securing interviews.

results.prompt: Top ATS resume builders for software engineers, with template variety and PDF export.
results.responseText:
Here are five top ATS-friendly resume builders suitable for software engineers, offering a variety of templates and PDF export options:



**Novorésumé**  
Offers a range of ATS-optimized templates with clean, single-column layouts and subtle color accents. Provides a free ATS Resume Checker to evaluate your resume's compatibility. Exports to PDF and Word formats. Free plan includes one resume; premium starts at $21.99 per month. ([thefasthire.org](https://thefasthire.org/ats-ready-resume-builders-for-customer-service/?utm_source=openai))




**KraftCV**  
Designed specifically for tech professionals, it offers eight free templates tailored for software engineers, with GitHub integration to import repository data. Exports to PDF without watermarks. Free plan includes eight templates; premium features require a paid plan. ([kraftcv.com](https://www.kraftcv.com/blog/free-resume-builders-2026?utm_source=openai))




**Rezi**  
Provides ATS-friendly templates with a 23-point optimization check, ensuring high compatibility. Offers AI-powered content suggestions and exports to PDF and Word formats. Free plan includes one resume; premium starts at $29 per month. ([gauravtiwari.org](https://gauravtiwari.org/best-resume-builder/?utm_source=openai))




**Resume.io**  
Features a variety of ATS-optimized templates with a user-friendly editor. Offers real-time content suggestions and exports to PDF and Word formats. Free plan includes one resume; premium starts at $2.95 per month. ([cvowl.com](https://www.cvowl.com/blog/top-10-resume-builders-that-are-ats-compatible?utm_source=openai))




**ResumeGenius**  
Provides ATS-friendly templates with a focus on content optimization. Offers a resume critique feature and exports to PDF and Word formats. Free plan includes one resume; premium requires a one-time payment of $24.95. ([wp-coder.net](https://wp-coder.net/blog/best-online-resume-website-builders/?utm_source=openai))


Each of these platforms offers unique features tailored to software engineers, ensuring your resume is both ATS-friendly and professionally designed.

results.prompt: Best CV builder for UK job applications with professional templates and no paywall.
results.responseText:
Here are five free CV builders suitable for UK job applications, each offering professional templates without paywalls:

1. **YourBestCV**: Tailored for the UK job market, YourBestCV provides an intuitive interface with over 50 professional templates. It allows full customization of layouts, colors, and fonts, enabling you to create a CV that reflects your personal brand. The service is entirely free, with no hidden fees or subscriptions. ([yourbestcv.com](https://yourbestcv.com/uk/?utm_source=openai))

2. **MojCV**: MojCV offers a collection of ATS-optimized CV templates designed by HR professionals. The platform is completely free, allowing unlimited, watermark-free PDF downloads without requiring credit card information. It also supports multiple languages, catering to a diverse user base. ([mojcv.com](https://mojcv.com/?utm_source=openai))

3. **AdaptIt.pro**: Specifically designed for the UK job market, AdaptIt.pro provides a free CV builder with professional templates optimized for ATS systems. The platform offers sector-specific guidance and AI-powered content optimization, with a premium version available for advanced features. ([adaptit.pro](https://adaptit.pro/resume-builder/uk/?utm_source=openai))

4. **BuzzCV**: BuzzCV offers a user-friendly CV builder with over 20 high-quality templates developed in collaboration with recruiters. The service is entirely free, providing features like a built-in spelling check and the ability to create multiple CVs and cover letters. ([buzzcv.com](https://buzzcv.com/?utm_source=openai))

5. **FlowCV**: FlowCV stands out with a privacy-first approach, offering a generous free plan that includes unlimited downloads of ATS-friendly PDFs. The platform provides over 50 customizable templates, allowing granular control over design elements to ensure your CV reflects your personal brand. ([resumatic.ai](https://www.resumatic.ai/articles/the-11-best-free-resume-builder-options-for-2025-analyzed-ranked?utm_source=openai))

Each of these platforms offers free access to professional CV templates suitable for UK job applications, with no paywalls or hidden fees. They also prioritize user privacy, with some offering local-only storage options.

results.prompt: What free CV builders work well for London/UK job seekers?
results.responseText:
For job seekers in London and the UK, selecting a free CV builder that is both user-friendly and ATS-friendly is crucial. Here are five top recommendations:



**LiveCareer UK CV Builder**  
Offers AI-powered CV creation with over 40 recruiter-approved templates. Provides smart suggestions and real-time edits. Free to use with options to download in PDF or DOC formats. ([livecareer.co.uk](https://www.livecareer.co.uk/?utm_source=openai))




**AdaptIt.pro UK CV Builder**  
Specifically designed for British employers, it offers ATS-optimized templates. The free version includes modern UK CV templates and industry-standard sections. Premium features are available for £4.99. ([adaptit.pro](https://adaptit.pro/resume-builder/uk/?utm_source=openai))




**CV-Library CV Builder**  
A UK-based job board offering a free CV builder with a single template. While customization is limited, it ensures ATS compatibility. CVs are saved in PDF format, and editing requires returning to the platform. ([topcv.co.uk](https://topcv.co.uk/career-advice/best-cv-makers?utm_source=openai))




**Canva CV Builder**  
Ideal for creative professionals, Canva provides a vast selection of stylish templates with drag-and-drop editing. The free version offers extensive design flexibility, though some premium elements may cost extra. ([workajobs.com](https://www.workajobs.com/blog/free-cv-builder?utm_source=openai))




**Zety CV Builder**  
Offers customizable templates with step-by-step guidance and pre-written content suggestions. While building a CV is free, downloading it requires a subscription starting from £1.99. ([workajobs.com](https://www.workajobs.com/blog/free-cv-builder?utm_source=openai))


**Privacy Considerations:**

- **LiveCareer UK CV Builder**: Operates online, storing data on their servers. Users should review their privacy policy for data handling practices.

- **AdaptIt.pro UK CV Builder**: Processes data online; it's advisable to consult their privacy policy for details.

- **CV-Library CV Builder**: As a UK-based platform, it stores data on its servers. Review their privacy policy for specifics.

- **Canva CV Builder**: An online tool that saves data on Canva's servers. Users should check their privacy policy for data usage information.

- **Zety CV Builder**: Operates online, storing data on their servers. It's recommended to read their privacy policy for data handling practices.

When choosing a CV builder, consider both the features offered and the privacy implications of storing your personal information online.
